name: io.github.codespar/paypal
description: MCP server for PayPal — global payments and payouts via REST API. Orders v2, Payments v2, Payouts, Subscriptions, Disputes, Webhooks.

environmentVariables.name: PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: PayPal REST app client id (from developer.paypal.com Apps & Credentials).

environmentVariables.name: PAYPAL_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: PayPal REST app client secret (OAuth2 client_credentials password).
